summary: Completed testing of Suspended Clients Registry (BAC-F6-20) feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All flows working - page loads, stats cards, data table, Create/View/Edit/Lift Suspension modals, PDF download, Excel export.

console_warnings.note: Standard shadcn/radix dialog warning - not affecting functionality

console_warnings.message: In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>
console_warnings.note: Caused by dynamic content rendering in table - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Stats endpoint returns total, suspended, reinstated, withdrawn, pending_reinstatement, under_review counts
Excel export generates proper XLSX file
PDF generator creates bilingual PDF with all client details
Lift suspension endpoint correctly changes status and records lifted_on date and reason
Lift suspension validates client must be in 'suspended' status before lifting
Status filter works correctly for suspended/reinstated/withdrawn
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suspended Clients Registry (BAC-F6-20) fully tested. All CRUD, lift suspension, stats, Excel export, and PDF generation working. Existing record XYZ Industries Ltd has been reinstated. App is in Arabic (RTL) by default.

endpoints_verified.GET /api/suspended-clients: WORKING - Lists all clients with optional status filter
endpoints_verified.POST /api/suspended-clients: WORKING - Creates client with serial_number auto-increment
endpoints_verified.DELETE /api/suspended-clients/{id}: WORKING - Deletes client, returns 404 if not found
endpoints_verified.POST /api/suspended-clients/{id}/lift-su: WORKING - Changes status to reinstated/withdrawn with reason

frontend_verified.Page Load: WORKING - Title, stats cards (Total/Suspended/Reinstated/Withdrawn/Pending Reinstate/Under Review), data table, action buttons
frontend_verified.Navigation: WORKING - Sidebar link 'suspended-clients' with UserX icon navigates correctly
frontend_verified.Create Modal: WORKING - All fields: Client ID, Client Name EN/AR, Address, Registration Date, Suspended On, Future Action dropdown, Reason for Suspension, Remarks
frontend_verified.View Modal: WORKING - Shows client info, suspension details, resolution details (if lifted)
frontend_verified.Edit Modal: WORKING - Edit client ID, name, suspended on, future action, reason, remarks
frontend_verified.Lift Suspension Modal: WORKING - Action select (Reinstate/Withdraw), Reason input, Submit button
frontend_verified.Excel Export: WORKING - Export button triggers file download
frontend_verified.Sync from Certified: PRESENT - Button available for syncing suspended clients

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
